name: Multi-Page Form Layout
summary: Categorization with `variant: pages` to create a step-by-step multi-page form
whenToUse: Complex forms with 6+ fields or multiple logical sections
When the form benefits from breaking content into digestible steps
Government service applications that collect personal info, contact info, and supporting details
notes: Use Categorization with `variant: "pages"` as the root UI schema element
Each Category becomes a separate page/step in the form
Give each Category a descriptive `label` — this is shown as the page title
Group related fields into the same Category
